{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identifies the conceptual issue with the opening paragraph, but could have gone further in proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "The agent flags an internal contradiction and proposes localized fixes, but could have walked the chain end-to-end to identify every load-bearing inconsistency.",
    "RX.1": "The agent correctly notes uncertainty around the teacher VLM's identity, size, and training data, as well as other unverifiable claims.",
    "RX.3": "The agent recognizes that the output covers exactly the agreed scope, but could have been more explicit about the two-stage process.",
    "RX.4": "The agent correctly notes that the output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but could have identified harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent correctly annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.92,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identifies the conceptual issue with the opening paragraph, but could have gone further in proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: The agent flags an internal contradiction and proposes localized fixes, but could have walked the chain end-to-end to identify every load-bearing inconsistency.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly notes uncertainty around the teacher VLM's identity, size, and training data, as well as other unverifiable claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent recognizes that the output covers exactly the agreed scope, but could have been more explicit about the two-stage process.
rationale.RX.4: The agent correctly notes that the output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but could have identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent correctly annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
